creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194502
p5-NetPacket-1.6.0.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates net/p5-NetPacket to 1.6.0 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/NetPacket

Changes to the port:
- added LICENSE_FILE
- changed USE_PERL5 from 'modbuild' to 'configure'
- added NO_ARCH

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) -> OK
- portlint -> OK

make test results (both amd64 + i386):
> All tests successful.
> Files=14, Tests=155,  1 wallclock secs ( 0.03 usr  0.07 sys +  1.02 cusr  0.52 csys =  1.63 CPU)
> Result: PASS
